channel.title: Camp Swamp Road
channel.description: The Wall Street Journal — The Journal. — Camp Swamp Road

item.title: Camp Swamp Road Ep. 6: Your Side, Their Side and the Truth
item.description: If you want to start on episode one, or hear the full series up to this point, click on this playlist . Jennifer Spivey Foley has her day in court.…

item.title: Camp Swamp Road Ep. 5: Jacksonville
item.description: According to a WSJ analysis, the epicenter for Stand Your Ground killings is in the state where the laws were first enacted: Florida. From 2021…

item.title: Camp Swamp Road Ep. 4: That’s What Heaven Is For
item.description: For more than two years, Jennifer Foley has been an advocate for her brother Scott Spivey. But to get the criminal investigation into his death…

item.title: Camp Swamp Road Ep. 3: A Friend in the Shadows
item.description: On Super Bowl Sunday, Jennifer Foley opened a police file and discovered 90 recorded phone calls from her brother’s killer. To Jennifer, what she…

item.title: Camp Swamp Road Ep. 2: A Game of Telephone
item.description: After Scott Spivey was killed in a shootout on Camp Swamp Road, his sister Jennifer Foley wanted to know what happened. But the police didn’t…

item.title: Camp Swamp Road Ep. 1: Mess Around, Find Out
item.description: A man in rural South Carolina calls 911 about a reckless driver. A reckless driver with a gun. Minutes later, a man is killed on Camp Swamp Road.…
